typeId.description: Optional. Restrict findings to switches declared on this type (canonical / qualified / short). Read+write counting still scans every loaded compilation.

moduleScope.description: Optional. Restrict findings to switches declared in this module/asmdef.

requireBranchCondition.description: Only audit booleans read in >=1 branch condition (the feature-switch shape). Default true; false widens to every boolean field & settable property.

includeProperties.description: Audit settable boolean properties as well as fields. Default true.

maxFindings.description: Optional. Cap on switches returned; defaults to 200. Zero / negative clamps to the default.

summarize.description: When true, return a compact verdict census: cap at 25 switches regardless of maxFindings AND drop each switch's evidence arrays (assignments / branchGatedMembers / mutators) — a widely-read flag carries many, so a count cap alone does not bound size. `verdictBreakdown` still counts every switch; query a specific typeId unsummarized for the evidence. Default false.

profileScope.description: Optional. Define profile to scope IOperation extraction to. Currently must match the retained profile. INV-MULTI-DEFINE-IOP-001.
